entries.source: "Is social media harmful?"
entries.value: "Je, mitandao ya kijamii ina madhara?"

entries.source: "Is space exploration worth it?"
entries.value: "Je, uchunguzi wa anga za juu unafaa?"

entries.source: "Should homework exist?"
entries.value: "Je, kazi ya nyumbani inapaswa kuwepo?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Debate any topic kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza hoja, ukiwa na vidokezo, mizunguko ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Mzunguko imara zaidi wa kusoma

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Kocha wa Mjadala wa AI kwa Hoja Kali Zaidi ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chagua mada yoyote na uingie kwenye mjadala halisi ana kwa ana. Chagua upande, changamkiwa, na jifunze kutoa hoja bora.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Answer counterarguments.
entries.value: Jibu hoja za kupinga.

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Hoja

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague mantiki yako, si matokeo tu.

entries.source: Choose a side.
entries.value: Chagua upande.

entries.source: Debate any topic
entries.value: Bishana kuhusu mada yoyote

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Malizia kwa kuandika wazo tena kutoka kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Vidokezo vya kujaribu

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Anza hali ya moja kwa moja kwenye Debate any topic. Ikiwa unataka muundo wa kujifunza unaokaribiana, jaribu Explain My Answer. Kwa mtazamo mpana zaidi wa jukwaa, soma kile ambacho mwenzi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kufanya kwa kila mtu.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Imarisha madai dhaifu.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Wanafunzi, wabishaji, waandishi, na wanafunzi wadadisi wanaotaka hoja zenye nguvu zaidi.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Iambie hali unachojaribu kujifunza au kutengeneza.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Tofauti hiyo huonekana katika mtiririko. Badala ya jibu moja kubwa, vipindi bora hupitia mzunguko: weka lengo, jaribu kitu, pata mrejesho, rekebisha sehemu dhaifu, na chagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Mkazo huo ni muhimu. Chatbot ya jumla inaweza kujibu karibu chochote, lakini hali ya kujifunza huipa mazungumzo umbo. Hukuelekeza kwenye aina ya kufikiri, mazoezi, mrejesho, au uchunguzi unaosaidia wazo kushikamana.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Mkufunzi hutoa hoja moja yenye nguvu ya kupinga kwa wakati mmoja na kufuatilia madai muhimu.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hii ndiyo tabia ile ile iliyo nyuma ya kusoma kwa AI bila kujidanganya: mfanye mwanafunzi abaki hai. AI ina manufaa zaidi inapokupa mrejesho kuhusu kufikiri kwako.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hali hii ina manufaa hasa kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Jaribu hatua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Tumia Debate any topic unapotaka kipindi kinachoanza haraka lakini bado kinajirekebisha kulingana nawe. Lengo la kwanza si kusikika wa kuvutia. Lengo la kwanza ni kufanya hatua inayofuata ihisi inawezekana.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hali hii husaidia nini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Pa kwenda baadaye

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.
